product.name: Solvent Weld Soil Above Ground Plain Ended Soil Pipe - 3m
product.description: This durable plastic soil pipe from JTM is intended for solvent weld joint. Available in standard 3m long segments with a 110mm diameter, it's fully compatible with most waste and underground drainage systems. It's designed to a strict 'EN-1566-1 Plastics Piping Systems for Soil and Waste Discharge (Low and High Temperature) Within the Building Structure' standard, so you can be sure it meets all relevant regulations.  Easy and quick to install, this plain ended plastic soil pipe is available in olive grey and black. It goes with fittings designed to an 'EN 1329-1 - Plastics Piping Systems for Soil and Waste Discharge (Low and High Temperature) Within the Building Structure'. All in all, it's a sturdy solution that will convey any sewage safely and securely. product.name: Climaflex Polyethylene Pipe Insulation 1m Lengths
product.description: Climaflex is a flexible polyethylene foam based closed cell pipe insulation suitable for a broad range of water and heating applications, frost protection and impact protection. It can be glued, taped or simply pushed together to form an insulated pipe, making it a convenient, versatile option. Available in 1mtr segments and multiple pipe sizes, Climaflex pipe insulation combines high performance and low cost in most domestic applications, giving you the best of both worlds. While you can also use it externally, keep in mind that it will degrade faster in sunlight.What's more, Climaflex pipe insulation is a sustainable, environmentally friendly solution that is completely CFC (chlorofluorocarbon) and HCFC (hydrochlorofluorocarbon) free and has an ODP (ozone depletion potential) of zero. It can accommodate temperatures ranging from -45 °C to +105 °C and has excellent thermal conductivity. Features & Benefits: Climaflex Polyethylene Pipe Insulation 1m LengthsHigh performance polyethylene-based closed-cell foam pipe insulation  Suitable for diverse heating and plumbing applications  Available in 1m segments and multiple pipe and thickness sizes  Thermal conductivity of 0.038 W/mK at 40°C, 0.036 W/mK at 20°C and 0.034 W/mK at 0°C  Environmentally friendly  Easy to fit

This MacValve can be fitted in many installations where a non-return is beneficial and can also be used to take the discharge from a pressure relief valve on an unvented domestic hot water storage system. When this MacValve is installed horizontally, the flow arrow must be in the uppermost position. This MacValve can be fitted in many installations where a non-return is beneficial and can also be used to take the discharge from a pressure relief valve on an unvented domestic hot water storage system.
